text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Creek, over here!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I'll be right there. Just give me one second to squish my bag into a
locker... There! Oh no, it won't close all the way...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Cause ya packed enough junk for a family of four. Forget it, I'm gonna
go track down Bourbon! Lemme know when you finish here!

text_block_list.name: Zombie
text_block_list.text: Ah. Aaaah... Auaaagh...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Wha—what the heck? I almost took ya for a real zombie. That getup'd
have the tykes cryin' the whole way home...

text_block_list.name: Zombie
text_block_list.text: Aaaaagh!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Gyaaaack?!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Ah! That shout just now...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: No, Rice's voice is softer than that. I'll have to keep searching.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Yaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Rice!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: B-Bourbon?! Eep!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Owww...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Tamamo?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
W-whoops... Wait, Rice?! And Bourbon too! Glad I found ya, I've
got—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Beep.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Beep. Beep. Beep. Beep. Beep.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: What... the hell is goin' on here? My phone's goin' crazy!
Heh... Hehehe. Fouuund you. ♪

text_block_list.name: The Four
text_block_list.text:
Aaaah!
Eep!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Got you! ♪ Now you're mine forever.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Geez, Cree—Wait, what on earth is dat outfit?!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, we still have the costume fittings, so I figured I'd try mine on. I
brought yours too! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Let me know if you want to go get changed. I'll help you put it on. ♪

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I-I don't know what it is, Creek, but... you seem different today.

text_block_list.name: Zombie
text_block_list.text: Aaaaaagh...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Aaaaah! Not another one!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh my, look how dirty you've gotten yourself. Come here.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Poor baby—your arm's all scuffed up. Let me get you all patched up
with a bandage.

text_block_list.name: Zombie
text_block_list.text: Ahh... maaah... mah?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, hold still now. There, now we match.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Just. Like. Mummy! ♪ Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Zombie
text_block_list.text: Muh, Mummy... Mummyyy...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Yes, sweetie! I'll do my best to be everyone's mummy this
Halloween. ♪ Hehe. There, there... ♪

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Oh, hell no... Why're ya playin' house with it? And the zombie—why's the zombie playin' along?!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Maybe the outfit makes Creek stronger? Kind of like... our racewear?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: ...So the clothes do make the racer.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: The clothes?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I've read that people used to wear scary costumes to disguise
themselves, but now, we have costumes of fun things too.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Halloween is a day to dress up and dare to be someone else. You can
borrow the costume's power to say things you can't say yourself.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: That's very intriguing.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that last bit wasn't in the book, though. That was just my
interpretation of it...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Information provided is not currently logged in Mission: "Cross-Dorm
Halloween Party" reference files. Potential for data collection,
confirmed.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Adding new task to queue: enjoy theme park.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hey! Wait for us, Bourbon—we're goin' too! You're who we're all here
for in the first place!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I'll tag along too. I'm always happy to chaperone. ♪
